story.executive_summary: Build a job-aligned medallion data platform project with measurable business outcomes and portfolio-ready artifacts.
story.challenge: Translate fragmented source data into trusted KPI reporting under tight delivery timelines.
story.approach: Implement bronze/silver/gold pipelines, data quality checks, and executive-friendly ROI dashboards.
story.impact_story: Demonstrate end-to-end ownership from ingestion through business narrative and stakeholder-ready metrics.

charter_exec.current_state: Reporting is delayed and teams reconcile metrics manually.
charter_exec.future_state: Decision makers use trusted self-serve KPIs refreshed on a predictable SLA.

data_source_names: Bureau of Labor Statistics Public Data API
